text.title: PM Certification Changes 2026 Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example showing PM Certification Changes 2026 applied end-to-end on a representative engagement.

example.title: Reference engagement
example.code: Report date: 2026-05-23 Effective ECO: 2026 (sittings on/after 2026-07-01) Weights table: People: 42 -> 33 (-9pp) Process: 50 -> 41 (-9pp) Business Environment: 8 -> 26 (+18pp) Question type changes: multi-correct, drag-and-drop expanded. Prep time deltas: early-career: +25h (BE concepts new) mid-career: +15h (targeted BE refresh) returning: +30h (catch-up on BE + new question types) Sources: PMI ECO 2026 PDF; PMI release notes.
example.note: Illustrates every rule from content/01-core-rules.xml on a realistic case.
